topActions.name: Shift to Circular & Second-hand Shopping
topActions.description: Transition to circular consumption: buy second-hand, rent clothing, or implement a 30-day cooling-off period before purchasing new items.

topActions.name: Optimize Air Conditioning
topActions.description: Reduce daily AC runtime by 2 hours (or set thermostat 2°C higher) to cut grid load during peak summer hours.

topActions.name: Adopt a Plant-Based Diet
topActions.description: Transition your diet away from high-emission animal products to vegetarian or vegan meals. This is the single most powerful dietary improvement you can make.

goal30.benefit: Reduce daily AC runtime by 2 hours (or set thermostat 2°C higher) to cut grid load during peak summer hours.

goal60.benefit: Transition to circular consumption: buy second-hand, rent clothing, or implement a 30-day cooling-off period before purchasing new items.

goal90.benefit: Transition your diet away from high-emission animal products to vegetarian or vegan meals. This is the single most powerful dietary improvement you can make.

insights.coachSummary: Household energy usage contributes 34% of your emissions. Reducing AC operation times, installing LED lighting, and switching off standby appliances is your best starting path.
